brand.name: OathFi
brand.subtitle: HTX Ecosystem AI Trading Research & Risk Agent

feedback.backendRequiredGeneric: Backend integration is not connected yet. This action will be available after the API handoff.
feedback.backendRequiredGenerateHypothesis: Backend integration is not connected yet. Hypothesis generation will use POST /api/hypotheses/generate later.
feedback.backendRequiredBacktest: Backend integration is not connected yet. Backtest creation will use POST /api/backtests later.
feedback.backendRequiredRisk: Backend integration is not connected yet. Risk checks will use POST /api/risk/checks later.
feedback.backendRequiredPaperExecution: Backend integration is not connected yet. Paper execution will be enabled after risk and order APIs are connected.
feedback.backendRequiredAuditReport: Backend integration is not connected yet. Audit report generation will use POST /api/audit-reports later.
feedback.backendRequiredPaperOrder: Backend not connected. Paper order creation is disabled; live trading remains disabled.
feedback.paperExecutionBlocked: Paper execution is blocked by the current hard-block decision.
feedback.strategyRejectedLocal: Strategy rejection is recorded locally for this demo view; backend audit logging is not connected yet.
feedback.auditLogVisible: Audit log is visible in this page. Backend replay will be connected later.
feedback.roadmapPlanned: HTX ecosystem items are roadmap-only and do not trigger backend actions in this round.
feedback.settingsLocalOnly: Settings changes are local to this frontend demo until the settings API is connected.
feedback.dataSourceCheckLocal: Data source status is shown from the current frontend store. Backend health checks are not connected yet.

commandCenter.title: Command Center
commandCenter.summary: Global operating surface for market events, agent status, risk posture, and demo workflow entry.

marketMonitor.title: Market Monitor
marketMonitor.summary: HTX market-data workspace for charts, order book depth, indicators, and event detection.

agentLab.title: Agent Lab
agentLab.summary: Structured research workspace for market context, reasoning, hypotheses, and strategy rules.

backtestStudio.title: Backtest Studio
backtestStudio.summary: Validation workspace for strategy rules, historical metrics, verdicts, and trade lists.

riskFirewall.title: Risk Firewall
riskFirewall.summary: Institutional risk-review layer for position sizing, rule checks, and paper-trading approval.

paperExecution.title: Paper Execution
paperExecution.summary: Controlled simulated execution surface for order preview, positions, and execution logs.

auditReports.title: Audit Reports
auditReports.summary: Review layer for market event, hypothesis, backtest, risk decision, execution, and final notes.

htxEcosystem.title: HTX Ecosystem
htxEcosystem.summary: Integration and roadmap view for HTX market data, AI compute, and future utility tiers.

settings.title: Settings
settings.summary: Configuration surface for data source, agent behavior, risk controls, demo mode, and language.

panelMeta.marketPulse: Dense market snapshot prepared for the Command Center.
panelMeta.agentStatus: Agent loop is visible in the global shell and ready for later workflow wiring.
panelMeta.riskSummary: Default mode stays guarded with live trading disabled.
panelMeta.klineChart: Chart surface belongs to the Market Monitor module.
panelMeta.orderBook: Depth, spread, imbalance, and liquidity score will attach here.
panelMeta.indicators: RSI, MACD, ATR, VWAP, and trend scoring belong in this panel.
panelMeta.marketContext: Selected symbol and market inputs feed structured hypothesis generation.
panelMeta.agentReasoning: The agent area is prepared as a research console, not a chat window.
panelMeta.hypotheses: Trigger, invalidation, risk, and backtest rule cards will land here.
panelMeta.strategyRule: Entry, exit, and risk controls are reserved for backtest validation.
panelMeta.backtestResult: Core metrics will include win rate, profit factor, expected value, drawdown, and trades.
panelMeta.equityCurve: The chart area is reserved for equity, drawdown, and distribution visuals.
panelMeta.riskDecision: Default decision remains approved for paper trading only.
panelMeta.positionSizing: Sizing will remain constrained by risk controls and demo mode.
panelMeta.ruleEvaluation: Rule-by-rule checks will use PASS, WARNING, and FAIL states.
panelMeta.orderTicket: Paper order fields will remain simulated by default.
panelMeta.executionPreview: Execution preview will never imply real live execution.
panelMeta.executionLog: Timestamps and audit records will attach to simulated fills.
panelMeta.reportList: Audit reports will summarize the full decision path.
panelMeta.reportDetail: Each detail view will cover event, hypothesis, backtest, risk, execution, and review.
panelMeta.auditTimeline: The review sequence mirrors the workflow stepper.
panelMeta.htxApi: Ticker, kline, order book, and trades connections are represented as public data integrations.
panelMeta.aiCompute: Provider settings remain demo, local, or configurable until integration.
panelMeta.htxUtility: Future tiers are shown as roadmap, not completed commerce.
panelMeta.dataSource: Public HTX market data is the default source.
panelMeta.agentSettings: Agent output stays structured, auditable, and constrained to research workflow fields.
panelMeta.riskSettings: Live trading remains disabled by default.
panelMeta.demoMode: Demo mode keeps orders, balances, and fills inside the simulator.
panelMeta.languageSettings: The selected language is stored locally and restored after refresh.

brief.question: Can ETH/USDT sustain a breakout continuation after the retest?
brief.scope: Research is constrained to public HTX market data, demo indicators, paper-only risk limits, and a backtest-ready rule packet.

hypothesis.meta: Ranked candidates include triggers, invalidation, and risk notes.

marketStructure.label: Market Structure

volatility.label: Volatility

regime.label: Regime
regime.meta: Trend score is constructive but still conditional.

ma.title: MA20 reclaim confirmed

book.title: Depth imbalance supports retest
book.detail: Bid-side liquidity expanded while spread stayed stable.

atr.title: Volatility requires capped size
atr.detail: ATR expansion reduces confidence until the next check.

audit.title: Decision path is traceable
audit.detail: Every hypothesis field maps to a backtest or risk rule.

context.title: Separate facts from assumptions
context.detail: Market inputs are pinned before the agent ranks any trade idea.

counter.title: Force the counter-thesis
counter.detail: The lab records why the setup could fail before approving a rule packet.

rule.title: Convert thesis into testable rules
rule.detail: Entry, invalidation, sizing, and audit fields must be explicit.

continuation.title: Breakout continuation after retest
continuation.summary: Lead candidate if price keeps MA20 support and bid depth remains constructive.
continuation.trigger: 15m close above 3,446 with depth imbalance above +12%.
continuation.invalidation: Close below 3,392 or two checks with fading volume.

meanRevert.title: Mean reversion into VWAP
meanRevert.summary: Secondary candidate if breakout momentum stalls but liquidity remains orderly.
meanRevert.risk: Reduced confidence due to trend alignment.

reject.title: Reject trade until volatility cools
reject.summary: Defensive option if ATR keeps expanding and the order book thins.
reject.trigger: ATR check fails or bid depth falls under threshold.
reject.invalidation: Volatility compresses and market structure stays intact.
reject.risk: No paper execution until checks recover.

entry.label: Entry Rule
entry.value: Close > MA20 + retest hold + depth confirmation

exit.label: Exit Rule
exit.value: Stop below retest; take-profit at 1.8R or momentum fade

position.label: Position Limit
position.value: Max 0.65 ETH, paper-only, no live execution

audit.label: Audit Fields
audit.value: Source event, evidence IDs, hypothesis rank, risk cap

rule.title: Rule packet complete
rule.meta: Backtest can consume entry, exit, size, and invalidation.

backtest.title: Backtest scope attached
backtest.meta: Timeframe, indicators, and benchmark are ready.

risk.title: Risk firewall pending
risk.meta: Final paper-only approval belongs to the next module.

brief.question: Does the ETH/USDT breakout continuation rule survive historical validation?
brief.scope: Backtest uses the Agent Lab rule packet, public HTX demo data, paper-only constraints, fees, slippage, and drawdown gates.

entry.label: Entry Conditions
entry.value: 15m close above 3,446, MA20 reclaim, retest hold, and depth imbalance above +12%.

exit.label: Exit Conditions
exit.value: Stop below retest zone; take-profit at 1.8R or exit on two momentum-fade checks.

risk.label: Risk Controls
risk.value: Paper-only size cap 0.65 ETH, max 1.1% account risk, no live execution.

filter.label: Sample Filter
filter.value: Exclude thin-liquidity windows and ATR spikes above the guarded threshold.

winRate.title: Win Rate
winRate.meta: Winning trades divided by completed samples.

profitFactor.title: Profit Factor
profitFactor.meta: Gross wins over gross losses after fees.

expectedValue.title: Expected Value
expectedValue.meta: Average expectancy per trade in R.

averageRr.title: Average R/R
averageRr.meta: Mean planned reward versus defined risk.

sampleQuality.title: Sample Quality
sampleQuality.meta: Coverage after liquidity and volatility filters.

sharpeRatio.title: Sharpe Ratio
sharpeRatio.meta: Risk-adjusted return for the demo sample.

verdict.title: Send to Risk Firewall with guarded sizing
verdict.summary: The rule has positive historical edge, but elevated drawdown periods require position limits before paper execution.
verdict.reviewOnly: Review only; paper order creation is disabled.

edge.title: Historical Edge
edge.value: Profit factor and expected value pass the validation threshold.

drawdown.title: Drawdown Gate
drawdown.value: Max drawdown is acceptable but must remain guarded.

sample.title: Sample Integrity
sample.value: Trade count and liquidity filters are sufficient for demo review.

charts.equityTitle: Equity curve after fees and slippage

empty.noBacktest: Historical validation is waiting for a generated hypothesis and backtest run.
empty.noTrades: No completed paper backtest trades are available yet.

brief.question: Should the validated ETH/USDT rule be approved for paper execution?
brief.scope: Risk review uses the backtest verdict, demo account limits, paper-only execution mode, live-trading lockout, and audit requirements.

labels.riskLevelMeta: Computed from rule blocks, warnings, market volatility, spread, and hypothesis risk.
labels.liveTradingMeta: Live execution must stay disabled before any paper handoff.
labels.executionModeMeta: Risk Firewall only approves paper execution.
labels.marketDataLive: Ticker, orderbook, and kline inputs are available.
labels.marketDataUnavailable: Market data unavailable. Risk decision is downgraded and uses fallback inputs.

rejection.title: {{count}} blocking reason(s)
rejection.summary: The current setup is rejected because one or more risk gates failed. The system will not create a paper order.
rejection.suggestion: Improve the backtest edge, reduce risk, or wait for a cleaner market condition before trying again.

riskLevel.title: Risk Level
riskLevel.meta: Drawdown warning keeps sizing below the normal demo cap.

decision.title: Risk Decision
decision.meta: Default approval is limited to simulated execution.

rules.title: Rule Checks
rules.meta: Every gate is evaluated before handoff to Paper Execution.

liveStatus.title: Live Trading
liveStatus.meta: The firewall does not expose real-money order approval.

position.accountEquityMeta: Demo account value used only for risk math.
position.riskPerTradeMeta: Hard cap applied before suggested size is calculated.
position.suggestedSizeMeta: Reduced by volatility and drawdown checks.
position.maxLossMeta: Worst-case simulated loss allowed by the firewall.

executionMode.notes: Live trading remains disabled by default.

accountRisk.notes: Risk per trade stays under the guarded account limit.

positionCap.notes: Suggested size is inside the paper-only cap.

drawdown.notes: Warning keeps approval limited and prevents size increase.

liquidity.notes: Order book depth is sufficient for demo review.

volatility.notes: Guarded size absorbs the elevated ATR reading.

stopLoss.notes: Stop level maps to the backtest rule packet.

audit.notes: Decision can be traced before paper execution.

final.title: APPROVED FOR PAPER TRADING
final.summary: The strategy may move to Paper Execution with constrained size. No live-trading permission is granted.

controls.paperOnly: Execution mode locked to paper trading.
controls.stop: Stop and invalidation must remain attached to the order ticket.
controls.audit: Risk decision is stored for audit review.

finalDecision.approvedSummary: The strategy can create a paper order draft using the stored risk_check_id and calculated position size.
finalDecision.conditionalSummary: Strategy adjustment is required; paper order creation is disabled.
finalDecision.rejectedSummary: The strategy is blocked by Risk Firewall rules and cannot create a paper order.

empty.disconnectedBody: Run a backend risk check from Backtest Studio before reviewing the firewall decision.

newsRisk.threshold: Hard block false; news risk below 55%
newsRisk.notes: Reads NewsRiskContext from the news intelligence module.

onChainRisk.notes: Uses whale, exchange inflow, unlock, and bridge-warning context.

macroRisk.notes: Uses Fed, CPI, rates, DXY, and geopolitical event context.

htxRisk.notes: Tracks HTX announcements, pair operations, and ecosystem events as context.

confidence.notes: Reads the shared Decision Engine result without recalculating it.

feasibility.notes: Uses execution feasibility from spread, liquidity, data quality, R/R, and risk.

risk.notes: Risk at 80 or higher must block the paper handoff.

hardBlock.notes: A hard block forces BLOCK or NO_TRADE and cannot be overridden by high Confidence.

brief.question: Create a simulated ETH/USDT order from the approved risk decision?
brief.scope: Paper Execution uses the risk-approved rule, demo account math, simulated fills, and audit logging only. No real funds, exchange orders, or wallet transfers are involved.

safety.title: Paper Trading Only
safety.body: This page controls the internal paper ledger only. No real funds, live exchange orders, wallet transfers, or real-money execution buttons are available.

funds.title: Funds
funds.meta: The order ticket reads demo balances and cannot touch user capital.

mode.title: Execution Mode
mode.meta: All fills are simulator records created for research review.

live.title: Live Trading
live.meta: No live order endpoint, wallet transfer, or exchange trade is available here.

audit.title: Audit Link
audit.meta: Every simulated fill links back to market, hypothesis, backtest, and risk decisions.

ticket.executeNote: This creates a simulated paper-trade record only; it does not send a live exchange order.
ticket.stale: Risk check stale. Return to Risk Firewall before execution.
ticket.riskRequired: A current risk check is required before execution.

preview.expectedRiskRewardMeta: Read from the stored Risk Firewall result.
preview.maxLossMeta: Derived from stop distance and backend risk sizing.
preview.expectedProfitMeta: Calculated from ticket price, target, and quantity.

preview.correlationMeta: Unavailable when the stored risk check is missing.
preview.estimatedFillMeta: Calculated from demo spread and slippage assumptions.
preview.slippageMeta: Applied to the simulator only, not an exchange book.
preview.feesMeta: Demo fee estimate for audit math.
preview.maxSimulatedLossMeta: Derived from stop distance and paper size.
preview.noExchangeOrder: Live exchange routing is disabled; this preview never becomes a real-money order.

backtest.title: Backtest verdict and trade sample linked

brief.title: HTX integration status without overclaiming
brief.summary: This page separates live HTX public-market connectivity from planned account access, B.AI compute, $HTX utility tiers, marketplace, and DAO governance.

details.htx_market_data_integration: Public ticker, kline, order book, and trades are checked through real HTX health calls.
details.b_ai_integration: B.AI remains planned until a provider connector and credentials exist.
details.htx_usage_tier: $HTX tiers remain roadmap-only until permissions and entitlement checks exist.
details.agent_marketplace: Marketplace access is not active without an agent publishing and permission layer.
details.dao_market_intelligence: DAO-level intelligence remains roadmap until governance rights are implemented.
